sft.notes: Prefer Fireworks managed SFT on hardened_verifier_sft.jsonl. Do not use attention-only LoRA.

rft.notes: RL/RFT needs very low adapter capacity; rank 1–16 often matches full FT.

platform_blocker: Fireworks preview qwen3-8b-128k rejects LORA_TRAINER on the Training API; managed SFT may still train adapters. Re-test --lora-rank when the training shape supports LoRA.
